summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Meetings.ro landing page rebrand implementation. All major features working correctly with one minor OG image issue.

ui_bugs.issue: OG image meta tag uses relative path instead of full URL

passed_tests: Root route redirects to preferred language (/en by default)
/ro and /en routes render with updated Meetings.ro branding
Language toggle switches between routes correctly and persists preference
Updated hero headlines: 'Orice ședință. Raport în minute.' (RO) and 'Any meeting. Report in minutes.' (EN)
Store badges implemented correctly with #coming-soon links and proper localized tooltips
Header desktop and mobile show localized store badges
Hero section primary CTA uses official localized store badges
Final CTA section uses official localized store badges
No CTAs point to old gal-transcribe.preview.emergentagent.com
Canonical URLs point to https://meetings.ro/ro and https://meetings.ro/en
Meetings.ro logo and favicon load correctly
Industry/verticals section exists between 9 fields and smart features with 4 cards
Verticals section contains GAL/Administrative, Banking & Finance, Legal, and Journalism & Media cards
Only verticals section is allowed to mention GAL (2 mentions found, appropriately placed)
Industry grid does not clip at 320px mobile width
EUR pricing fully implemented: Free 0€, Pro 20€, Business 60€, Enterprise 900€
Monthly/annual billing toggle works correctly
Business pricing card is featured with 'Popular' badge
Business pricing card uses store badges instead of old app CTA
Enterprise pricing uses mailto:hello@meetings.ro
Add-on vertical card exists showing 90€/month
FAQ section works with all 5 items including new industry question
No old dollar pricing shown in UI
Nine fields section remains intact and functional
Offline Upload Story section remains intact
Trust/Security section remains intact
Footer structure remains intact with correct links
Schema.org markup uses EUR currency correctly
Mobile responsiveness works correctly at 320px width
success_percentage: frontend: 97% (1 minor issue out of 30+ test cases)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix OG image meta tag to use full URL instead of relative path. Change from '/assets/branding/og-image.png' to 'https://meetings.ro/assets/branding/og-image.png' in the meta tag output.
